nasb.text: If he takes to himself another woman, he may not reduce her food, her clothing, or her conjugal rights.

esv.text: If he takes another wife to himself, he shall not diminish her food, her clothing, or her marital rights.

cnv.text: 如果他另娶一個妻子，那麼，對她的飲食、衣著和性的需要，仍然不可減少。

ccb.text: 倘若有人娶了奴婢为妻，后来又另娶，他还是要照常供给她饭食和衣服，并履行同房的义务。
